effect_entries.effect:
Pendant cinq tours, empêche tous les Pokémon au sol de dormir et renforce leurs capacités eletric d'1.5× leur puissance.

Change nature power en thunderbolt.
effect_entries.short_effect: Pendant cinq tours, empêche tous les Pokémon au sol de dormir et renforce leurs capacités electric d'1.5× leur puissance.

effect_entries.effect:
For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

Changes nature power to thunderbolt.
effect_entries.short_effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.
